contract_claim: The session ID accessor casts `runner.getWorker()` through `unknown as Record<string, string>` to access `currentSessionId`, which is a private field. If `getWorker()` returns null/undefined or if the private field is renamed, this will silently return `'unknown'` due to the `??` fallback — but the cast itself bypasses TypeScript type safety and could produce undefined behavior if the internal shape of the worker changes.
observed_behavior: The session ID accessor casts `runner.getWorker()` through `unknown as Record<string, string>` to access `currentSessionId`, which is a private field. If `getWorker()` returns null/undefined or if the private field is renamed, this will silently return `'unknown'` due to the `??` fallback — but the cast itself bypasses TypeScript type safety and could produce undefined behavior if the internal shape of the worker changes.
